docstrings.Bz2Plugin.write: Writes the provided data to the Bzip2 compressed file.
docstrings.GzipPlugin.write: Writes the provided data to the Gzip compressed file.
docstrings.LZMAPlugin.write: Writes the provided data to the LZMA compressed file.
docstrings.PostProcessingManager.tell: Returns the current position of the file pointer.
docstrings.PostProcessingManager.writable: Returns whether the manager is writable.
